ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_traffic" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "flow_src" TEXT /* Source IP address and port of the network flow */,
  "flow_dst" TEXT /* Destination IP address and port of the network flow */,
  "throughput" REAL /* The rate of data transmission in the network */,
  "delay" REAL /* The time delay in the network */,
  "jitter" REAL /* The variation in delay in the network */,
  "tx_packets" INTEGER /* The number of packets transmitted */,
  "rx_packets" INTEGER /* The number of packets received */,
  "lost_packets" INTEGER /* The number of packets lost */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network segment where the traffic is recorded */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* The protocol used (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "packet_size" REAL /* The average size of packets */,
  "application" TEXT /* The application generating the traffic */,
  "classification" TEXT /* The classification of the traffic (e.g., normal, suspicious, malicious) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp", "flow_src", "flow_dst"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_traffic_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES network_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the network segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network segment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the network segment */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* The bandwidth capacity of the segment */,
  "uptime" REAL /* The uptime of the segment */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The last time the segment was updated */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* The security level of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, analyst) */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network segment the user is responsible for */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "notification_preference" TEXT /* The user's notification preferences (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES network_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network segment where the alert occurred */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., throughput, delay, jitter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* The severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* The resolution status of the alert */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* The user responsible for resolving the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES network_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network segment covered by the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* The user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, error) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* The last modified timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES network_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API access event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp when the API was accessed */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key used for accessing the NTMS */,
  "endpoint" TEXT /* Endpoint accessed by the third-party application */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* HTTP response code from the NTMS API */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The user who accessed the API */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the API request */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* The HTTP method used (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "request_body_size" INTEGER /* The size of the request body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
